title: Post Grad Life | #shorts
full_text: So what is your guys's goal at the end of college? Cuz you're both in various stages of college life now. What do you want to do at the end? You want a corporate job. You want to be an entrepreneur. What do you want to do? I want to have finally found myself. Know I who I am emotionally. I have found you. You are here now. What next? I want to know why I feel the way I feel. What my purpose is on this planet. Yeah. I want a sense of direction. I want to feel like I was adventurous and I tried new things and I'm ready to take on the world as an adult. Direct yourself to a new job. Direct what was that for? What was the world? There is no page. You are on the page of homelessness right now. That is your only page. The page you're going to cover your body with on the streets of New York.
